items.title: Eala suffers second round defeat to Mertens at Madrid Open
items.summary: Alex Eala has been eliminated from the Madrid Open with a straight sets loss to 19th seed Elise Mertens

items.title: Once locks, which USMNT players have their World Cup spots in jeopardy?
items.summary: There are many players who will undoubtedly play for the United States at the 2026 World Cup. But some players who were locks in the past, are now set to probably miss out.
